projects.description: Accessory Dwelling Unit - New Construction or Conversion

requirements.label: Site Plan
requirements.description: Plot plan showing entire property and proposed ADU footprint.

requirements.label: Floor Plan
requirements.description: Dimensioned layout of each room, windows, and doors.

requirements.label: Elevations
requirements.description: Exterior views of all four sides of the structure.

requirements.label: Section Details
requirements.description: Cross-section showing foundation, walls, and roof structure.

requirements.label: Title 24 Energy Report
requirements.description: Compliance certificate for energy efficiency standards.

requirements.label: Structural Calculations
requirements.description: Engineering analysis for foundation and framing.

requirements.label: Single Line Diagram
requirements.description: Schematic of the electrical system and panel upgrade if needed.

requirements.label: Plumbing Layout
requirements.description: Plan showing waste and supply lines to city sewer/water.
